name: Low-Cal Chocolate Spread
description: A spreadable, glossy chocolate frosting/spread at a fraction of the calories of a chocolate or hazelnut spread — the body is 0% Greek yogurt + cocoa, with just a little melted semi-sweet chocolate for gloss and real-chocolate flavor. Higher protein, low fat. Reusable sub-recipe: top cheesecakes, brownies, cakes. 1 batch ~ tops one 8-slice cheesecake.

steps.instructionText: Melt the chocolate chips in short microwave bursts, stirring, until just smooth.

Whisk the melted chocolate into the Greek yogurt with the cocoa, Splenda, a pinch of baking soda (neutralizes the yogurt's tang for a cleaner chocolate flavor and lightly darkens the cocoa), and a splash of milk to loosen — until smooth and glossy. Use right away, or chill briefly to firm.

notes.text: Fold the melted chocolate into ROOM-TEMPERATURE yogurt — fridge-cold yogurt seizes the melted chocolate into tiny hard bits instead of a smooth spread. Let the yogurt sit out ~15 min first, or warm it briefly.

Body comes from yogurt + cocoa, not butter/cream — that's what keeps it low-cal and adds protein. For a darker, bittersweet version, swap a few grams of the chips for unsweetened baking chocolate plus a touch more Splenda.
